description_long: This object is a set of five short swords or large knives, each featuring a broad, straight blade with a pronounced central ridge and angular tip. The blades are metallic gray, with some showing notched or chipped edges, suggesting use or intentional design. Each sword has a distinct hilt design, but all share a gold-colored guard and pommel, with the handles wrapped in a reddish-brown material for grip. The guards are geometric, with some featuring circular or angular motifs, and the pommels are either rounded or faceted. The overall aesthetic is stylized and robust, reminiscent of fantasy or historical weaponry. These swords would be visually striking in an urban display, collection, or as props in a themed environment.
description: A set of five broad-bladed, gold-guarded swords with reddish-brown wrapped handles and stylized, angular designs. The blades are metallic gray with some notched edges and prominent central ridges.
description_view_0: A top-down view showing the narrow profile of the blades and the alignment of the guards and pommels.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full faces of all five swords, highlighting the blade shapes, notches, and decorative guards.
description_view_2: A rear view emphasizing the straightness of the blades and the symmetry of the handles and pommels.
description_view_3: An angled view similar to view 1, showing the thickness of the blades and the three-dimensionality of the guards and handles.
attribute_blade_type: straight, broad, single-edged, angular tip, some notched edges
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, wrapped in reddish-brown material, gold pommel, some with geometric accents
attribute_ornamentation: geometric gold guards and pommels, some notched blade edges
